channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump calls for adding 10,000 Border Patrol agents after derailing a bipartisan border bill
item.description: PRESCOTT VALLEY, Ariz. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump on Sunday proposed hiring 10,000 additional Border Patrol agents and giving them a $10,000 retention and signing bonus, after he derailed a bipartisan bill earlier this year that included funding for more border personnel.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump receives unanimous endorsement from Border Patrol Union
item.description: The president of the National Border Patrol Council announced that the union for border patrol agents was fully supporting former President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US will send a missile defense system and troops to run it to Israel to aid defense against Iran
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The United States will send a T erminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel, along with the troops needed to operate it, the Pentagon said Sunday, even as Iran warned Washington to keep American military forces out of Israel. Maj. Gen.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Riverside Co. Sheriff says deputies 'probably' prevented third assassination attempt on Trump
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities. The arrest took place at a checkpoint at the intersection of Avenue 52 and Celebration Drive in Coachella at 4:59 p.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: US to deploy missile defense system, military personnel to Israel
item.description: President Biden approved the deployment of an advanced missile defense system to Israel along with roughly 100 U.S. troops.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Walz mocked after being caught on video struggling to load his own shotgun
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz was the butt of social media jokes after he was caught on video struggling to load his own shotgun during a three-hour opening day pheasant hunt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says national abortion ban is 'off the table,' but 'we’ll see what happens'
item.description: Former President Trump said Sunday that a national abortion ban is “off the table,” but he left the door open on the conversation by saying “we’ll see what happens.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JD Vance warns of consequences for America if we continue to rely on 'Chinese slave labor'
item.description: Sen. JD Vance sounded the alarm on U.S. manufacturing on Sunday, telling Fox News that America has relied too long on Chinese "slave labor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Moreno's abortion comment rattles debate in expensive Senate race in Republican-leaning Ohio
item.description: Ohio's close Senate race took a twist recently when cellphone video surfaced of Republican Bernie Moreno criticizing women whose votes are driven by the abortion issue.
item.dc:creator: Julie Carr Smyth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: From the pulpit, Harris calls out Trump for hurricane misinformation. Biden surveys Florida's damage
item.description: Kamala Harris has used an appearance before a largely Black church audience in battleground North Carolina to call out Donald Trump for spreading misinformation about the federal government's hurricane response.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani And Josh Boak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Legislative majorities giving one party all the power are in play in several states
item.description: A behind-the-scenes battle is underway between Democrats and Republicans for supermajority control of state legislatures across the country.
item.dc:creator: John Hanna And David A. Lieb, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump hits Harris on immigration in her home state of California
item.description: Former President Trump slammed Vice President Harris in her native California on Saturday evening, ranting about migrants and bashing illegal immigration in the Golden State.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Fight for House raging in districts ringing NYC where Trump struggled but other Republicans thrived
item.description: NELSONVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — Voters in a ring of congressional districts encircling New York City where Republican candidates often do well but Donald Trump struggled in 2020 could decide which party controls the U.S. House for the next two years.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris-Walz campaign targets hunters, fishermen for support
item.description: The Harris-Walz campaign launched a new coalition designed to draw voter support from outdoorsmen in swing states
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Mask mandates return for health care facilities in deep blue state
item.description: Certain California counties in the Bay Area have reinstated limited mask mandates for health care facilities during flu and cold season to prevent the spread of illness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data shows migrants aren’t taking jobs from Black or Hispanic people, despite what Trump says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected — a promise he has predicated, in part, on the notion that immigrants in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donald Trump, Kamala Harris still neck-and-neck in swing states
item.description: Data coming out of critical swing states show that any polling margins remain razor thin and within the margin of error
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Donald Trump holds a rally in California, a state he's almost certain to lose
item.description: The White House election is expected to come down to battlegrounds such as Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Blood, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jamie Dimon: 'Treacherous' geopolitical conditions getting worse
item.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon on Friday warned about potential risks in the future for the economy, citing the war in Ukraine and Israel's war against Hamas and Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: How to watch the NY-18 Debate: Ryan vs. Esposito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Candidates in the race for New York’s 18th Congressional District will face off in a debate Wednesday night. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan will take on Republican challenger Alison Esposito in a 60-minute debate moderated by PIX11’s Henry Rosoff.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: In battleground states, it's not just about winning — but also losing by less
item.description: In a state where every vote matters, both Democratic and Republican campaigns are not only trying to win in counties where they’re strongest, they’re also trying to lose by less.
item.dc:creator: Ari Shapiro, Mia Venkat, Karen Zamora, and Ashley Brown, MPR News

item.title: Lombardo among GOP governors criticizing Biden-Harris immigration asylum actions
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo was among 25 Republican governors who signed a letter criticizing the Biden-Harris administration over asylum policies that have brought more than a half-million immigrants into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris, Walz appeared on ABC's 'The View' and 'Jimmy Kimmel Live'
item.description: The Democratic presidential ticket is on a media blitz in New York. Vice President Kamala Harris appeared Tuesday on ABC's “The View," and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz appeared on ABC's “Jimmy Kimmel Live” on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: Melania Trump is waving off speculation that she didn't want to hold her husband's hand, chalking up images of her seemingly "swatting" away former President Donald Trump to a "mere misunderstanding.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Harris is pressed for more specifics in a wide-ranging interview with '60 Minutes'
item.description: The interview followed criticism from former President Donald Trump that Kamala Harris has been unwilling to sit for hard interviews. She was pressed on everything from her economic proposals to immigration.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Trump intends to use military to round up opponents: Michael Cohen
item.description: “The big warning that I want people to understand is when Donald Trump says something, stop sane washing it. Stop trying to make it into something which has some normalcy to it. What he says, he intends to do.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senator calls Trump special counsel filing 'a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic'
item.description: Arkansas Sen. Tom Cotton (R) said in a Sunday interview that a recently unsealed filing from special counsel Jack Smith is “a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5
